feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: RAP Fiori Elements List Report Page with Analytical Table - How to?
entry.content:
Hi community,

I’m currently trying to implement a Fiori Elements List Report based on RAP and OData V4 and I’m struggling to align the current technical limitations with what is announced on the SAP roadmap.

My requirement

I need a generated Fiori Elements application that provides:

  • a List Report
    • using an Analytical Table
    • showing totals and subtotals for measures (amounts / quantities with currency or unit)
    • while still allowing create / update operations on the underlying business data via RAP

In other words:
👉Aggregations (totals/subtotals) and editability in the same List Page.

Roadmap reference

According to the SAP Roadmap (Q3 2025):

Support for analytical tables
Use analytical tables to provide users with totals and subtotals in applications
Feature is delivered as described in the documentation: Tables – SAPUI5 SDK

Based on this roadmap entry, I would assume that using an AnalyticalTable in a Fiori Elements List Report is now intended to be a supported and productive option.

What I experience in practice

  • When using a transactional RAP BO (provider contract transactional_query) as the data source:
    • editing works as expected
    • but configuring the table as AnalyticalTable leads to aggregation-related errors
      (e.g. “Aggregation not supported for this entity type” or
      “Property ‘Currency’ is not flagged as custom aggregate”)
    • When switching to an analytical query view (@analytics.query: true😞
      • totals and subtotals work
      • but the entity becomes read-only, so editing is no longer possible
    • The Annotations @odata.applySupportedForAggregation: #FULL
      (mentioned in this scenario) is not permitted in RAP CDS view entities.

My open questions

  1. With the roadmap item marked as delivered:
    1. is it now officially supported to use an Analytical Table in a Fiori Elements List Report on top of a transactional RAP BO?
  2. If yes: what is the recommended architecture?
    1. a single transactional RAP BO with analytical capabilities?

    2. or still a separation between analytical (read-only) and transactional entities?

  3. If not: does the roadmap item only refer to UI5 analytical tables in general, but not to RAP-based, editable Fiori Elements List Reports yet?

Any clarification on the intended usage and current limitations would be highly appreciated.

Thanks a lot in advance and best regards;
Sarah

entry.title: Company Logo Not Displayed in Payment Advice Email Template
entry.content:
Hellor,

In the “Maintain Email Templates” application in SAP Public Cloud, I have created an email body template for payment advice notifications. The email text is displayed correctly, but the company logo does not appear when the message is sent to an external email address.

The client provided us with the logo, but it is not published on any public website. When I use the image link, SAP displays it correctly within the system, but the logo is not shown in the outgoing email. The HTML code I am using is the following:

<div style="float:left;width:25%">
<img style="width:50%" src="https://my418744.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/APS_OM_LOGO_SRV/ImageSet(Name='YY1_LOGOBIOWASTE')/$value">
</div>

Does anyone know if there is a way to make the logo visible in the email even though it is not publicly available on the internet?

Thank you very much and kind regards.

entry.title: How to group Business Roles and Role Upgrades in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I've few concern in below about the "How to group Business Roles and Role Upgrades in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition"

1. Is there any way to group multiple Business Roles into a composite role and assign that composite role to a user?
2. Is there any way to create a Reference User that contains the required roles, and then assign that user to other users who need the same roles?
3. When SAP upgrades a SAP Business Role Template, how can the Business Roles created from that template be upgraded accordingly?

Please help to advise

Thanks,

Gabriel

entry.title: Replacing SMTP with Microsoft Graph API for Workflow Email Notifications in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We have a requirement in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to replace the standard SMTP-based email sending mechanism with Microsoft Graph API for sending email notifications from Procurement Workflows (PO status updates).

Currently:

  • We are using a standard flexible workflow for purchase orders.

  • Email notifications are sent via the standard SMTP configuration in Communication Arrangement.

  • These emails are triggered by workflow steps (approval, rejection, status update, etc.).

New requirement:

  • Due to corporate IT/security policy, SMTP usage is restricted.

  • We are required to use Microsoft Graph API (OAuth 2.0) for sending emails instead of SMTP.

We would like to understand:

  1. Is it technically possible in S/4HANA Public Cloud to replace standard SMTP with Microsoft Graph API for workflow emails?

  2. Is there any standard SAP-supported alternative to SMTP for outbound emails (for example, via SAP BTP services or API-based mail service)?

  3. Can workflow email notifications be redirected to:

    • SAP BTP (via API), and

    • then sent using the Microsoft Graph API from BTP?

  4. Are there any SAP Notes or official documentation confirming:

    • SMTP is mandatory for workflow emails, or

    • Is API-based email sending supported?

  5. Has anyone implemented a similar scenario using

    • SAP Build Process Automation / BTP Integration Suite / custom service with MS Graph API?

Our goal is to:

  • Avoid SMTP completely, and

  • Use Microsoft Graph API with OAuth authentication for all outbound workflow email notifications.

Any guidance on:

  • Supported architecture,

  • Limitations in S/4HANA Public Cloud,

  • or recommended best practice would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Harshal

entry.title: CDS view for accessing customer group(sales area) in a customer master
entry.content:
I want to know the CDS view which can return me the customer group inside a BADI:_SD_SLS_CHECK_BEFORE_SAVE  based on customer as an input

Please advice

#CDS

entry.title: How to Map Fiori Apps to Their Underlying Data Sources (Tables/CDS Views/Queries) in Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm working with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (using Fiori apps) and would like to analyze the complete data lineage from Fiori apps down to their underlying data sources.

Specifically, I want to understand:

1. Which database tables, CDS views, or queries a specific Fiori app uses
2. How to trace the relationship between:
- Fiori App → OData Service → CDS Views → Database Tables
3. For Query Browser specifically, how to identify which CDS views it references and understand the logic behind it

Since we have limited backend access in Public Edition (no SE16N, SEGW, or other GUI transactions), I'm wondering:

- Can I use View Browser app to trace these relationships effectively?
- How can I find the OData service used by a specific Fiori app?
- Is there a way to see which tables are used by a CDS view in Public Edition?
- Are there any Fiori apps or tools available in Public Edition for this kind of data lineage analysis?

I've tried using View Browser and App Support tool, but I'd like to know if there are recommended best practices or additional techniques for comprehensive data source mapping in a Public Edition environment.

Any guidance or documentation references would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance.

Best regards

entry.title: Need alternative CDS view that allows us to access the history of material prices
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I need an alternative CDS view to access the history of material prices for creating a Z report on period-wise standard cost and moving average cost of a material valuation.

Could you please help to identify which CDS view can fulfill this requirement?

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud 2602 / Navigation from Notifications to My Inbox - Expert view
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
i have a question about the following topic. The users in our system should use the App My Inbox to access their open Tasks that they recieve from workflows. Because of custom attributes we wanted to display in the Inbox, we decided that all users should use the App My Inbox in the Expert Mode. 
The problem is, that if a user gets a notification for an open task on his homepage and then clicks on the bell and then on the task, the Task gets opened in the "normal" My Inbox App. 
My question is, are we able to change the App that opens when you click on a notfication from the normal Inbox to the Inbox in the expert mode ? And if so how ?

Best regards
Lukas

entry.title: Display the attachedment directly in the web browser
entry.content:
Dear All,

I would like the attached file in the PR line item to open and display directly in the web browser when clicked, instead of being downloaded. Is this possible?

Regards,

Keratiya D.

entry.title: APIs for stock inventory and sales volume
entry.content:
Hello,

Please for a short step-by-step guide to identify the correct API in BTP for extracting data from apps Stock - Multiple Materials & Sales Volume - Flexible Analysis

Our system is SAP S4/HANA Public Cloud

Thank you!

Plamen,

Shelly Group

entry.title: Custom Business Catalog missing in App "Manage Launchpad Pages"
entry.content:
Hello,

I am facing an issue deploying my app in S/4HANA Public Cloud. I developed it using RAP and Fiori in BAS, following this tutorial:
https://sapzero2hero.com/2024/01/21/sap-s-4hana-cloud-developer-extensibility-with-upload-excel/

I cannot see the business catalog in Manage Launchpad Pages. In my custom catalog, the Custom Catalog Extension contains the IAM app created in ADT (Eclipse), but when I click it, I get “The requested catalog was not found".

However, I can see the IAM app in Display IAM Apps.

Could you please help ?

entry.title: CK2027 Error When Marking Standard Cost Estimates in F1865 - Organizational Measure Not Allowed for
entry.content:
## Issue Description

**Error Message:** CK2027
**Error Text:**
> "In Legal Valuation the following occurred: You are trying to mark materials for period 002/2026 and company code 1510 in ledger 0L, although marking has not been allowed for this."

**System:** SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
**App Used:** F1865 - Manage Costing Runs - Estimated Costs
**Step Failed:** Marking step in costing run execution
**Business Context:** Standard cost estimate marking for period 002/2026

---

## Root Cause

The organizational measure (organizational standard) has not been enabled for **marking standard cost estimates** for the following combination:
- Company Code: 1510
- Ledger: 0L (Leading Ledger)
- Period: 002/2026
- Valuation Type: Legal Valuation

---

## Solution

### Step 1: Navigate to Organizational Standards App

**App ID to search:** Look for organizational standards/measures app (likely something like F2XXX or similar)

**Search terms in SAP Fiori Launchpad:**
- "Organizational Standards"
- "Organizational Measure"
- "Manage Organizational Standards"
- "組織標準"

### Step 2: Access the Configuration

Once in the app:

1. Filter/navigate to:
- Company Code: **1510**
- Ledger: **0L**
- Fiscal Year/Period: **002/2026**

2. Look for settings related to **Product Costing** or **Material Price Determination**

### Step 3: Enable Marking Permission

1. Click on **Company Code** or **Valuation View** in the list
2. You'll either see:
- Permitted costing variants (if already enabled), OR
- A request/button to enable organizational measure
3. Enable marking for your **Costing Variant** used in the costing run
4. Ensure **"Allow Marking"** is checked for period 002/2026
5. Save

### Step 4: Retry in F1865

1. Go back to **F1865 - Manage Costing Runs - Estimated Costs**
2. Select your costing run
3. Re-execute the **Marking** step

Error should be resolved.

---

## Additional Info Needed

**Question:** What is the exact Fiori App ID for managing organizational standards in your system? (So I can give you the exact app to use)

entry.title: Unable to Create Custom Analytical Query in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

I’m reaching out to ask for some guidance regarding an issue I’m experiencing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

I’m trying to create a new Custom Analytical Query using the Custom Analytical Queries app in the test environment, as I would like to start exploring and working with this functionality. However, when I access the app, the “Create” button is disabled, and I’m unable to proceed.

I have already reviewed the business roles and catalog permissions assigned to my user, and they appear to include the necessary authorizations to create analytical queries.

These are my business roles

These are permissions for business rol 1

These are permissions for business rol 2

I’ve searched through available documentation and tried different approaches, but I haven’t been able to identify the root cause.

Has anyone experienced a similar issue or can provide guidance on what additional configuration, role, or restriction I should verify?

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

Kind regards,
Octavio

entry.title: RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY BAdI in s4hana public cloud
entry.content:
I want to create RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY BAdI via custom logic app in s4hana public cloud.

But I can't find that BAdI in custom logic. Why? Is there any configuration setting I need to activate?

Best Regards,

Khaing ZIn

entry.title: CDS view data delay: API insert in early morning, visible only after 8+ hours
entry.content: Hi experts, We insert journal entry data into SAP via a Post API in the early morning (China time). However, when querying the same data using my custom CDS view, the data only becomes visible after more than 8 hours. What could be causing this delay? Are there any solutions to reduce the waiting time? Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Can Custom Alternative Material Logic Be Embedded in MRP on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
I’m currently evaluating the feasibility of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with a customer who has very specific requirements regarding alternative materials:
  • Their internal alternative material logic differs significantly from SAP’s standard ATP (Available-to-Promise) substitution rules.
  • They require that during the MRP run—not at the production order execution level—their custom substitution logic be applied to evaluate net requirements, and that procurement or production proposals be generated based on this customized calculation.
They explicitly do not want substitution handled only as an exception during production execution, but rather integrated into the planning layer itself.
My questions are:
  1. Within the constraints of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, are there any innovative or feasible approaches to support this requirement?
  2. Can the BAdI PPH_SUPPLY_DEMAND_LIST be leveraged to implement this scenario—i.e., dynamically inject supply/demand elements based on the customer’s substitution logic during the MRP run?

entry.title: KSEF 2.0 Setup no drccApiUrl in BTP service binding credentials
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are trying to set up the KSEF 2.0 connection fpr our S4 Hana cloud public edition system via BTP to KSEF. We are following Integrating All Other Processes and Countries/Regions with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition . At step Getting the URL for a Service Binding there is no field drccApiUrl, only tokenURL (see screenshot).  Is this general behaviour, or did we misconifgure something at previous steps. If so what do we need to correct?

Thanks for your help in advance, 

Best regards.

entry.title: Credit check result details not shown with error reaction at delivery (SAP Cloud ERP)
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

We are using credit check at the delivery step and our reaction type is D (Like B-with exceeded limit) at the configuration 101518-Define Automatic Credit Control. 

But while creating delivery at public cloud with this configuration do not give the details for error message. We need obstruct the saving of delivery.  

Already there is a note for S/4HANA  and solution is to Modifying the method if_ex_badi_sd_cm~fscm_display_credit_messages, but we need this modification for public cloud project. And looking from another screeen and calculating the limits is not a feasible solution. We need option 2. This is a important step for our go-live date.   

Here the note and community link for S/4HANA solution: 

SAP community answer: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/static-credit-check-during-delivery-not-showing-amount-exceeded-fscm/qaq-p/12670231 

Sap note: https://me.sap.com/notes/2871140 

--- Steps to Reproduce ---

  1. Create credit check relevant sales order/delivery document 
  1. Try to save the document 
  1. Receive VM010 error message: "Credit check SAP Credit Management failed Credit Segment xxxx of partner yyyyy" 

Thanks in advance for your support!

BR,
Evrim

fyi @hasanbayram  @yusufavci @dogaozdogan 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM Custom logic not working for changing delivery quantity (SAP Cloud ERP)
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We need to use LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM  logic to change item quantity at delivery bu when we implemented the logic it change the data at backend and cds views but at the screen G_LFIMG value stands constant. 

We implemented custom logic as below: 

 

After we created the delivery quantity still seen as 3 at main screen 

Bu at picking tab of item LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM worked and changed quantity to 1 

Even in the cds views values are changed to 1 but still G_LFIMG field seems as 3 

 

BR,
Evrim

fyi @hasanbayram @yusufavci @dogaozdogan 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: Timesheet Time Entry with Multiple Activity Allocation & Activity Derivation Functionality
entry.content:
Hello dear SAP Gurus,

   In our customer we need an overhead allocation functionality with activity types to post project related indirect costs from cost center to WBS elements. The design expectation is using activity types sourced by timesheet, since costing sheet is not flexible and determination of overhead rates can not be done because of less correlation with any base account group, it is off the table.  Let me make our scenario clearer :

-> Project planning held and source demand took place,

-> A worker post timesheet entry and activity T001 (Labor) has allocated, journal entry created via 943* -> 100 EUR credits CC, debits WBS

Because our client would want to observe general project costs and deprecitation ( which are not going to run onto WBS' but CC's) during the period ( at least close to the actual expectation as possible via cost rates) and costing sheet isn't functional for them, they would also like to observe at least two other activities from a single timesheet entry; lets say T002 (Depr.) and T003 (GPC) 

The same can be managed on work center level on acitivity confirmation scnearios in production, yet as far as we understand that timesheet entries have 1:1 relations with activity types which are determined by the demand and the worker service cost level. Also, template allocation functions are not available in Cloud Public edition, we can't manage to derivate multiple activity allocations from a template. 

My question is, is there such functionality of multiple activity allocation from single timesheet entry supported in standard ? If not, is there a tool to derivate multiple activity allocations with reference to source entry ? 

And in general, is there another procedure under this scope to allocate overheads from cost centers to WBS elements ? Briefly, expectation is tracking activity allocations in projects similar to production.

   Thanks in advance for your guidance and support, please ask if you need more details on the requested info.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Timesheet SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance
